## Issue Type
- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Unclear documentation
- [ ] Outdated documentation
- [ ] Incorrect information

## Location
Where is the documentation issue?
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] DEVELOPMENT.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] JSDoc comments in code
- [ ] GitHub wiki/issues
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Current Content (if applicable)
Paste the current documentation or describe what's there:

```
Current text here
```

## Problem Description
What's wrong with the current documentation?
- Is it missing information?
- Is it confusing or unclear?
- Does it contain incorrect information?
- Is it outdated?

## Suggested Improvement
What should the documentation say instead?

```
Suggested text here
```

## Context
Why is this documentation improvement needed? Who would benefit?

- Related issues: #
- Related PRs: #
- External references: [link]

## Additional Notes
